subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! The Wronged One is in manifest sorrow. My grief deriveth not from the martyrdom of My chosen ones, nor from that which hath befallen Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا ان المظلوم فی حزن مبین لیس حزنی من شهاده اولیائی و لا ما ورد علی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
